---
title: "Lectures"
---

The workshop is built around six lectures that follow the canonical scRNA-seq workflow. Each lecture pairs with one or more hands-on tutorials --- read the lecture first, then work the matching tutorial.

## Lecture series

| # | Lecture | Pairs with |
|---|---|---|
| 01 | [Bulk vs. Single-Cell RNA-seq: What & How](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_01_Bulk_vs_scRNAseq.html) | [Tutorial 01 --- QC & Preprocessing](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_01_QC_Preprocessing.html) |
| 02 | [Pre-processing: QC, doublets, normalization, HVGs](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_02_Preprocessing.html) | [Tutorial 01 --- QC & Preprocessing](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_01_QC_Preprocessing.html) |
| 03 | [Dim Reduction, Integration & Clustering](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_03_DimRed_Integration_Clustering.html) | [Tutorial 02 --- Dim Reduction & Clustering](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_02_DimReduction_Clustering.html) |
| 04 | [Annotation: Manual & Reference-based](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_04_Annotation.html) | [Tutorial 03](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_03_Markers_Annotation.html) + [Tutorial 05](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_05_Reference_Annotation.html) |
| 05 | [Downstream Analyses: DE, Enrichment, WGCNA, Trajectory, CCC](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_05_Downstream.html) | [Tutorial 04 --- Pseudobulk DE](Exercise_Folder/Tutorial_04_Pseudobulk_DE.html) |
| 06 | [Beyond scRNA-seq: Spatial, ATAC, Multi-omics](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_06_Beyond_scRNAseq.html) | [Bonus --- scATAC-seq with Signac](Exercise_Folder/Exercise_ATACseq_Signac.html) |

## Extra topics

-   [Pseudobulk Differential Expression](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_Extra_Pseudobulk.html) --- a longer-form deep dive on the topic introduced in Lec 05.

## Pre-requisite computational background

The pre-requisite computational tools (computing fundamentals, Unix, R, Git, HPC) are no longer presented as lectures. They live as long-form reading material under [Resources](Resources.qmd).

## Quarto Template for New Lectures

[Lecture Template (source)](Lecture_Folder/Lecture_Template.qmd)

## Datasets for In-Class Exercises

See the [Datasets](Datasets.qmd) page for download URLs, expected directory layout, and disk-space requirements.
